_comment: Regression baseline for tight UI slot character lengths. Each value is the current maximum across all shipped locales (snapshot 2026-04-16) plus a small buffer. The string-overflow guard test fails when any locale's translation exceeds the listed length, so future regressions (or new locales with worse translations) surface in CI before shipping. Limits are intentionally regression-only, not the actual control widths — many shipped translations already overflow visually and need translator review (tracked separately). When a translation is hand-improved below these caps, tighten the cap to lock in the win.
_methodology: max-across-all-locales as of snapshot date, no headroom. Lower a number when translations improve; never raise it without explaining why.
